fields.label: Approval Code
fields.description: UPPER_SNAKE immutable integration key. Docname. Regex ^[A-Z][A-Z0-9_]{1,49}$.

fields.label: Icon
fields.description: Icon key (lucide/feather) rendered by the frontend in a later phase.

fields.label: Card Status
fields.description: Card-level state. Disabled is the only card off switch (no is_active field on this DocType).

fields.label: Process Status
fields.options:
Discovery
Designing
Building
UAT
Live
Retired
fields.description: Internal migration progress, independent of card_status. Retired = retired business process.

fields.label: Route
fields.description: Target route, only meaningful when card_status is Active. Must start with '/'. '/approval' is reserved and rejected.

fields.label: Available From
fields.description: Hidden from normal users until this date (enforced by the service layer in a later phase).

fields.label: Visibility Mode
fields.options:
All Internal Users
Restricted Roles
Restricted Departments
Admin Only
fields.description: Backend service enforces visibility. Empty Restricted Roles/Departments returns no card (fail-safe).

fields.label: Allowed Roles
fields.description: Used only when visibility_mode = Restricted Roles.

fields.label: Allowed Departments
fields.description: Used only when visibility_mode = Restricted Departments.

fields.label: Legacy Template Name
fields.description: Original MS Teams approval template name (migration traceability).
